mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room_participant WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND left_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM room_participant WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND member_idx = #{memberIdx}
SELECT * FROM room_participant WHERE member_idx = #{memberIdx} AND payment_status = 'UNPAID'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participant( room_idx, member_idx, participant_role, selection_status, payment_status, joined_at ) VALUES ( #{roomIdx}, #{memberIdx}, #{participantRole}, 'NOT_SELECTED', 'UNPAID', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE room_participant SET joined_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, left_at = NULL WHERE room_participant_idx = #{roomParticipantIdx}
